Entire 6.3-year career at IT services firms (HCL, TCS) in Android development and DevOps roles with only self-taught AI exposure via online courses and a small RAG side project, and no production ML, IR, or ranking system experience.

Marketing and sales career spanning fictional-company red flags (Pied Piper, Wayne Enterprises) and IT services (Wipro, Infosys), with skills entirely in Agile, Go, Rust, and GraphQL and no ML or AI engineering work whatsoever.
